title: Paper & Pen vs Tally
metaTitle: Paper & Pen vs Tally · Free Cloud Tally Alternative · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Compare Paper & Pen and Tally on cloud access, free plan, Arabic RTL, multi-currency and online payments. A modern, free, cloud alternative to desktop Tally.
keywords: paper and pen vs tally, tally alternative, cloud tally alternative, free tally alternative, tally prime online, arabic accounting software
heroSubtitle: Tally is a trusted accounting workhorse with deep roots. Paper & Pen is a free, cloud-native ERP you open in a browser, with Arabic, online payments and any currency. Here is the honest comparison.
heroBullets: Arabic RTL plus online card payments

features.title: True cloud
features.desc: No install, no license dongle, no per-machine setup. Open Paper & Pen anywhere, on any device.

features.title: Get paid online
features.desc: Every invoice can carry a Paymob payment link so customers pay by card and the payment reconciles itself.

features.title: Free to start
features.desc: Invoicing and sales are free forever, with no upfront license to buy before you can issue a document.

sections.title: Where Tally is strong
sections.body: Tally has a long track record, deep statutory accounting and a huge installed base of accountants who know it inside out. For complex bookkeeping done offline by a trained operator, it is fast and reliable. Many businesses run on it happily for years.
items: Familiar to a large pool of accountants

sections.title: Cloud, Arabic and getting paid
sections.body: Paper & Pen runs in the browser, so your team and accountant see the same live data from anywhere, with no installs or version mismatches. It is Arabic-first with a full right-to-left interface, bills natively in OMR, AED, SAR and any currency, and puts an online payment link on every invoice. The starting point is genuinely free.
items: No installs, always the latest version
Online payment links on invoices, free core

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen a good Tally alternative?
faqs.a: Yes, if you want cloud access, online payments and an Arabic interface without buying a licence. Tally remains strong for offline statutory bookkeeping by a trained operator.

faqs.q: Can I use Paper & Pen without installing anything?
faqs.a: Yes. It is fully cloud-based. You open it in a browser on any device, and everyone sees the same live data.

faqs.q: Does Paper & Pen support multiple currencies like Tally?
faqs.a: Yes. You can invoice in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and more, with correct decimals per document.

faqs.q: Can customers pay my invoices online?
faqs.a: Yes. Each invoice can include a Paymob payment link, so customers pay by card and the payment reconciles automatically.
Yes. Sales and invoicing are free forever. You only pay if you add modules such as Inventory, HR or Accounting.

ctaSub: Open a free Paper & Pen workspace in your browser and issue your first invoice in minutes. No licence, no install.
